require "hash"

def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Int64
    # 1. Collect unique elements U and counts
    counts : Hash(Int64, Int) = {}
    u : Set(Int64) = Set.new
    
    nums.each do |x|
        counts[x] = (counts[x] ? counts[x] + 1 : 1)
        u.add(x)
    end
    
    # 2. Calculate m_x for all x in U (the minimum reachable value for x)
    m_x_map : Hash(Int64, Int64) = {}
    
    u.each do |x|
        min_reachable = x
        
        # Find all divisors of x and check if they are in U
        i = 1
        while i * i <= x
            if x % i == 0
                # Check divisor d1 = i
                d1 = i
                if u.contains?(d1)
                    min_reachable = min(min_reachable, d1)
                end
                
                # Check divisor d2 = x/i
                d2 = x / i
                if u.contains?(d2)
                    min_reachable = min(min_reachable, d2)
                end
            end
            i += 1
        end
        
        m_x_map[x] = min_reachable
    end
    
    # 3. Calculate the total minimum sum
    total_sum : Int64 = 0
    
    counts.each do |x, count|
        min_val = m_x_map[x]
        # count is Int, convert to Int64 before multiplication
        total_sum += Int64(count) * min_val
    end
    
    total_sum
end

def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Int64
    # 1. Collect unique elements U and counts
    counts : Hash(Int64, Int) = {}
    u : Set(Int64) = Set.new
    
    nums.each do |x|
        counts[x] = (counts[x] ? counts[x] + 1 : 1)
        u.add(x)
    end
    
    # 2. Calculate m_x for all x in U
    # m_x_map[x] stores the minimum reachable value for x
    m_x_map : Hash(Int64, Int64) = {}
    
    u.each do |x|
        min_reachable = x
        
        # Find divisors of x
        i = 1
        while i * i <= x
            if x % i == 0
                # Check divisor i
                d1 = i
                if u.contains?(d1)
                    min_reachable = min(min_reachable, d1)
                end
                
                # Check divisor x/i
                d2 = x / i
                if u.contains?(d2)
                    min_reachable = min(min_reachable, d2)
                end
            end
            i += 1
        end
        
        m_x_map[x] = min_reachable
    end
    
    # 3. Calculate the total minimum sum
    total_sum : Int64 = 0
    
    counts.each do |x, count|
        min_val = m_x_map[x]
        # Count is Int, need to convert to Int64 for multiplication safety
        total_sum += Int64(count) * min_val
    end
    
    total_sum
end
